programme.title: The Mystery of the Hooded Horsemen
programme.desc: In a small frontier mining town a gang of outlaws in black hoods is running roughshod over locals presiding over a reign of terror Tex Tex Ritter and Stubby Horace Murphy take up the dying wish of Tom Lafe McKee a kindly rancher killed by the gang to capture the marauders Knowing that the survival of the local mine and the heart of Toms sweet daughter Iris Meredith are on the line Tex and Stubby go undercover in the gang hoping to bring them down from the inside

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Innerspace
programme.desc: A test pilot is miniaturized in a secret experiment and accidentally injected into a hapless store clerk

programme.title: The Money Pit
programme.desc: A young couple struggles to repair a hopelessly dilapidated house

programme.title: Battlefield Vietnam 2
programme.desc: Part 2 The Undeclared War

programme.title: The Hunt For The Hood
programme.desc: The Hunt to Find Britains Greatest Battleship She was a mighty symbol of Britains greatness yet she was destroyed in just three-and-a-half minutes Had the ship been fatally weakened by her twenty long years of all-but-continuous operations on the high seas Hopefully resurrecting this magnificent warship will provide the answers to the questions that have baffled a generation

programme.title: Tornado Down
programme.desc: Operation Desert Storm was only a day old when Tornado pilots John Peters and John Nichol were shot down in Iraqi territory and subsequently tortured and paraded on TV Bruised and battered the two men mumbled incoherently into the camera and instantly became symbols around the world of Saddam’s savagery and aggression In Tornado Down the two pilots break their silence and in a series of moving and candid interviews reveal the physical and psychological torment they suffered at the hands of their captors; the brutal torture sessions; the elation of their release; and their determination not to crack in the face of such cruelty and humiliation

programme.title: Dogfight - The Mystery of the Red Baron
programme.desc: The corpse-lined trenches of Northern France are well known as one of the deadliest killing grounds of World War I In fact proportionatly an even more lethal war was taking place in the skies over Europe The worlds first flying aces were regarded as the cosseted glamour boys of The Great War But by 1917 the life expectancy of a new pilot was just two weeks

programme.title: Man of the Frontier
programme.desc: At the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious natureAt the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious nature

programme.title: In Old Caliente
programme.desc: Americans come West to California in the hope of peaceful settlement

programme.title: Man of the Forest
programme.desc: The kidnapping of an heir to a ranch goes awry when the Man of the Forest mistrusted by the heiress takes matters into his own hands with the help of his pet cougar

programme.title: Deadwood 76
programme.desc: A young drifter is mistaken for Billy the Kid The consequences prove deadly

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A greedy woman makes the mistake of murdering her husband while an escaped mental patient dressed in a Santa Claus outfit is on the loose

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Cold ruthless Kay Mason runs a garment factory and treats her illegal Mexican immigrant workers in a cruel inhumane manner Kay meets her match in Victor a handsome mysterious young Mexican in whom Kay develops an amorous interest

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A flashy businessman finds out he owns a slum apartment building and is unwilling to make repairs until strange things begin to happen to him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick and Schanke are followed by a crew from a reality television show When Nick is caught vamping vampire enforcers try to kill all who saw

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A witch fights to gain a powerful occult symbol using a helpless Ryan in the process

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: Trapped in a missile silo a small team of scientists civilians and trigger-happy soldiers battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race but tension inside the base is reaching breaking-point and the zombies are gathering outside

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A man struggles with his age on his birthday believing that his son is out to kill him and a teenager confronts her mom about possibly being adopted

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A bum displays his ability to resurrect himself

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Luke need a new gun for a shooting contest Kate needs a new dress to be inducted into the PTA Theres just enough money in the cookie jar for one of them

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Grant and Steiger scheme to have the seven lady truckers imprisoned in Diablo Countys tough womens prison To spring his friends BJ agrees to a prisoners vs guards football game While Angie is in prison BJ cares for and mentors her rebellious nephew

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur buys a pair of pearl earrings as a surprise for Carol on her birthday but a home burglar has other plans for them

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Both Carol and Ed want Wilbur to hire a famous decorator to redo the house and stable in a Hawaiian Modern motif

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Col Hogan is less than thrilled when he is assigned to help an obnoxious American general flee Stalag 13 - and the secret plan involving a prisoner swap winds up as trying and difficult as the arrogant escapee himself

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: When the gangs hidden cache of money - needed to purchase a secret map - goes up in smoke the men of Stalag 13 must come up with a way to replace the cash - and decide to pull off a bank heist in the nearby town

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Crew take in a young orphan girl and go out of their way to make a happy home for her on their island But their extraordinary behavior arouses Binghamtons suspicions and he uses the situation to have the 73 Crew sized up as possible Section 8s by some visiting Psychiatrists

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: During a mission to investigate the crash site of a Japanese transport plane McHale and The Crew recover 4 million dollars in American cash Thinking that its counterfeit they return to base where Gruber later trades it to Chief Urulu for some native trinkets But when they find out that the money is real - Stolen by the Japs from a bank in The Philippines - Gruber challenges Urulu to a winner-take-all poker game to get it back

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Part 3 of Sea Maneuvers has Carter challenging the Petty Chief Officer to a boxing match not knowing the Chief was the Fleet Champ with 37 knockouts

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer helps a recruit smuggle his girlfriend into the barracks

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Mr Howell names the other castaways as beneficiaries in his will But he then fears they may be trying to kill him for their inheritance when in reality they are throwing a surprise party for him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan believes he has become an old man after his hair turns completely white overnight but The Professors solution only makes things worse when his hair completely falls out

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys find out that they are three months behind on their mortgage payments and will lose the farm if they cant come up with the money Grandpa fears that he will have to sell a 200 year old flintlock family rifle to get the payment

programme.title: The Black Tent
programme.desc: In the African desert a British soldier romances the native chiefs daughter and helps the tribe fight off a Nazi attack

programme.title: Reach For the Sky
programme.desc: Biopic of RAF Group Captain Douglas Bader who after having lost both legs flew a British fighter plane during WWII

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A German plot to kidnap Sir Winston Churchill unfolds at the height of World War II

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget interrupts his holiday in Hawaii to stop MAD from turning it into their latest missile base by pretending that an ancient volcano is still active

programme.title: Hercules 220
programme.desc: Hercules 220

programme.title: Earth The Final Conflict
programme.desc: Boone tries to find out who murdered his wife

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Morthren manipulate a Corporate magnate by seemingly restoring his health into selling them a top city newspaper he controls to give the aliens a tool for propaganda

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Trapped in a cave with Alec and facing death by suffocation Arcane reviews his life in a grand soliloquy He can lie to others but ultimately can he lie to himself

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: 40 years ago a plane carrying valuable Egyptian antiquities and a mummy crashed in the swamp Arcane supports an expedition to find it but his interest is far more than financial

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter a miles-long ark from the planet Daria where the inhabitants have a very distinctive class separation

programme.title: My Science Project
programme.desc: A teen John Stockwell and his girlfriend Danielle von Zerneck raid a military junkyard and find a time-travel contraption from a UFO

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Millionaire CJ Holmes is determined not to allow his daughter Suzy to marry farmer Fred Andrews When Suzy appeals to the Dukes for help CJs henchmen kidnap Uncle Jesse in a last-ditch effort to stop the wedding Jesse decides to teach the millionaire a lesson about the dedication and self-sacrifice of farmers

programme.title: Hercules 218
programme.desc: Hercules 218

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Detectives Stone and Keller investigate how a contract killer obtained inside information on the movement of a mob witness

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon poses as the wife of an archaeologist with a serious heart condition He needs to be rescued and an assassination plot needs to be foiled

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man signs up people to a magazine subscription showing them his Congressional Medal of Honor to prove his honesty However it is a scam as there is no magazine

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working out of the juvenile division when they get called to a movie theater to investigate an attack on a high school student who had acid thrown on his back The suspect is another boy named Gerald Paulson who is emotionally disturbed Later Gerald has an argument with his stepfather and runs out of the house carrying a live hand grenade Eventually Friday and Gannon trail him to a house where a girl he attends high school with is throwing a party and he is holding them hostage and threatening to pull the pin It is now up to the two detectives to get the grenade out of his hands before he kills himself and seriously wounds several other people

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: When Kimble reads of his fathers death he wants to go back home to meet his sister Gerard is expecting this and the DA who convicted Kimble hopes his capture will make him Governor But Kimble has an unexpected ally helping him

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: As Heath settles into life in the Valley his authority is questioned by the men employed to aid him in a huge cattle drive which is further complicated by the arrival of a former general with plans of his own

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Scouting for the army Cheyenne reports of an impending attack Fleeing to another fort the commanding officers route to that fort seems more dangerous than the alternate and Cheyenne isnt the only one who disagrees

programme.title: Young 302
programme.desc: Young 302

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Anis Dada v. Scott Turner

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: 2017 - John Blamire v. Tommy Gunn

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Mike Hernandez at HK50

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Cody Clarke

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Salih Kulucan v. Ryan Scott

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Chaleur Jones v. Kayla Matton.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 23 filmed at the Subway Soccer Center in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle in the cage. Cody Clarke vs. Matthew Norman; Phil Towler vs. Ryan Shanahan; Jesse Arnett vs. Mike O'Neill; Daymon Miller vs. Beau Bentley.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Smith v. Gareth Millar

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 24 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Tyson Haines vs. Cody Puls; Felix "The Cat" Jimenez vs. Steven Arens; Curtis Richard vs. Madison Mejia; Adam Zarrillo vs. Derek Lapierre.

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Sam Kwasman Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who is the original voice of Donald Duck-Mr Sam Kwasman Also the legendary Freda Payne returns to the show to speak about her recent Induction

programme.title: The Annalisa Guidone Interview
programme.desc: The lovely actress Annalisa stops by the show to talk about the dark side of being a female in the industry

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The DC Glenn Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Chico Brown Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.title: The Sean Kanan Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Cobra Kai star Sean Kanan aka Mr Mike Barnes Learn how the success of Karate Kid 3 and Cobra Kai still amazes him

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Unknown to Saw Boss Audric is captured and one of many on board a slave ship Jayces root responds to Audrics and a disguised Jayce boards the slave ship in search of Audric Audrics friends mistakenly think Jayce is an enemy

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM uses mutated vines to overgrow Los Angeles in order to force California officials to pay a hefty ransom MASK must find an antidote for the seemingly unstoppable plants to foil Mayhems plan

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: A lost Inca priest frozen in ice awakens with knowledge of El Dorado a city of gold hidden in the Andes mountains VENOM promptly kidnaps the priest and his god T-Bob to find the treasure MASK then attempts a daring rescue

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Brothers of Light and Shadow

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Reunion in the Wilderness

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain is hypnotizing residents of an Earth-like world with a special kind of newspaper ink The N team encounters a guy named Julio who tries to get to the bottom of this hypnotic business and is the only one who is not under the effect of the hypnosis The N team discovers that Julio is actually illiterate

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin is feeling under the weather since he caught a video virus His friends must help him so they shrink themselves and go inside Kevins body to fight the virus

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.desc: Magic Gadget

programme.desc: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The last Guardians escape to Earth after the fall of Gobotron while Cy-Kill and Master Renegade begin planning the attack on Earth

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Last Engineer devises a plan - and a set of Power Suits - which could defeat the Renegades

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss invents a thermal ray which dangerously overheats the Prides engines forcing the Lightning League to land on Sandeen in search of amethysts a cooling gem which can protect the engines This is Saw Boss plan A prisoner Antar escapes
